identitySource: Existing LinkedIn brand assets supplied by the user

selectedAssets.transformation: The original square master was resized to 1080 x 1080. The wordmark below the established symbol was covered with background sampled from the same source so the symbol remains legible in a circular Facebook crop.
selectedAssets.safeArea: The complete DC/data-bars symbol remains inside the circular profile crop.

selectedAssets.transformation: Six pixels were cropped from the left and right sides of the 2038 x 771 LinkedIn master before high-quality resizing to 1640 x 624. No text, logo, colour or illustration content was regenerated.
selectedAssets.safeArea: The existing master already leaves the left side quiet for profile overlap. Verify the live Facebook desktop and mobile crop before publication.

productionAssets.purpose: Default Open Graph and Facebook link-preview image

provenance: The live Facebook profile and cover exports use deterministic crops, compositing and resizing from the exact user-supplied LinkedIn identity. The separate production Open Graph card was created with a constrained generative reformat of the approved cover and then resized to exactly 1200 x 630.
constraints: Preserve the LinkedIn logo, cyan/green palette, headline and supporting copy
Wire only approved selected assets into production
